movie.overview: A successful mod photographer in London whose world is bounded by fashion, pop music, marijuana, and easy sex, feels his life is boring and despairing. But in the course of a single day he unknowingly captures a death on film.
movie.tagline: Sometimes, reality is the strangest fantasy of all.
movie.title: Blow-Up

cast.name: Janet Street-Porter
cast.character: Girl Dancing In Ricky Tick Club (uncredited)
